summary: Backend testing complete for VIP Alerts System modernization. All 18 tests PASSED. Verified: /api/vip/alerts/cryptos returns list of 20 popular cryptos (BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, XRP, ADA, DOGE, DOT, AVAX, LINK, TON, SHIB, LTC, MATIC, UNI, ATOM, APT, ARB, OP, NEAR), /api/vip/alerts POST creates alerts with crypto_symbol/alert_type/target_value, /api/vip/alerts GET returns user alerts, /api/vip/alerts/{id} DELETE removes alerts. Copy Trading removed from frontend FEATURES nav array (confirmed via code review). Crypto tools still functional with real data.

minor.issue: CoinGecko 429 rate limits cause current_price=0 for all cryptos in the response
minor.note: Expected behavior with free CoinGecko API. Crypto list and symbols still work correctly. Consider caching or CoinGecko Pro API for real-time prices.

critical_code_review_comments: POPULAR_CRYPTOS list at line 2231-2252 correctly contains 20 popular cryptos with id, symbol, name
/api/vip/alerts/cryptos endpoint (line 2254-2287) fetches real-time prices from CoinGecko with fallback
/api/vip/alerts POST endpoint (line 2200-2220) creates alerts with proper validation and achievement awarding
/api/vip/alerts GET endpoint (line 2190-2198) returns user's alerts with _id excluded
/api/vip/alerts/{id} DELETE endpoint (line 2222-2228) properly validates user ownership
Frontend FEATURES array (hub.tsx line 134-142) correctly excludes copy-trading from navigation
Frontend vipAPI.getAvailableCryptos() and createAlert()/deleteAlert() properly defined in utils/api.ts (lines 198, 148-150)
seed_data_creation: None needed - alerts created and deleted during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP Alerts API fully functional. 20 popular cryptos available for alert creation. CRUD operations work correctly. Copy Trading removed from frontend FEATURES navigation but still available via API. CoinGecko rate limits (429) handled gracefully.

api_endpoints_tested.result: Returns 20 cryptos: BTC, ETH, BNB, SOL, XRP, ADA, DOGE, DOT, AVAX, LINK, TON, SHIB, LTC, MATIC, UNI, ATOM, APT, ARB, OP, NEAR
Creates alerts correctly with both price_above and price_below types
Deletes alerts and returns 404 for non-existent
Crypto tools still functional - Fear & Greed (9), BTC Dominance (54.68%), Halving (778 days)

available_cryptos.note: current_price=0 due to CoinGecko 429 rate limits

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All data sources are real external APIs. CoinGecko uses fallback values when rate limited.
